converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Chai Feldblum papers
Feldblum, Chai.
Campaign for Military Service
7697
19.2 cubic feet. 19.2 cubic feet.
1975-1997. Collection material in English Materials of Professor Chai Feldblum relating to the effort by the Campaign for Military Service to assist President Clinton in his stated desire to lift the ban on gay service members. These materials include all documents used to lobby Congress and raise public awareness in 1993, as well as internal documents detailing efforts to propose alternatives to the Don't Ask Don't Tell policy. Also, files regarding the Employment Non-Discrimination Act (ENDA). Printed material, manuscripts, and videocassettes. 4835070
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor Chai Feldblum was the Legal Director for the Campaign for Military Service (CMS).
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Materials of Professor Chai Feldblum relating to the effort by the Campaign for Military Service to assist President Clinton in his stated desire to lift the ban on gay service members. These materials include all documents used to lobby Congress and raise public awareness in 1993, as well as internal documents detailing efforts to propose alternatives to the Don't Ask Don't Tell policy.
Also, files regarding the Employment Non-Discrimination Act (ENDA).
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Andrea Hektor
Date completed:
Sept. 2003
EAD encoding:
Andrea Hektor, Sept. 2003
Date modified
Ben Wrubel, June 2018
Conditions Governing Access
Access for research purposes only.
One folder of correspondence has been RESTRICTED until 2019. This folder is temporarily stored in the Accession File.
Cite As:
Chai Feldbllum papers, #7697. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Processing Information
Where possible, original folder headings have been retained. Folders labeled "Miscellaneous" contain information papers, comments by Navy officers, retired officials and veterans, various background papers, and other ban-related miscellany.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Briefing Notebooks Boxes 1-2
Series II. Congressional Record Project Boxes 2-3
Series III. Research Files Boxes 3-15, 19-20
Series IV. CMS Organizational Materials Box 15
Series V. Videos Box 16
Series VI. Employment Non-Discrimination Act (ENDA) Boxes 17-22
Videotapes. Don\'t Ask, Don\'t Tell policy. Gay military personnel -- United States -- Government policy. ENDA.

Access restrictedSeries V.
